description: DMV Hearings and Appeals — schedules administrative hearings, tracks evidence submissions, and generates hearing officer decision documents

hard_stops.label: Hearing Notice Not Served
hard_stops.logic: Respondent was not served with hearing notice within the statutory minimum notice period — hearing must be rescheduled

hard_stops.label: Hearing Officer Conflict of Interest
hard_stops.logic: Assigned hearing officer has a declared conflict of interest with the respondent or case — must recuse and reassign

soft_flags.label: Continuance Requested
soft_flags.logic: Respondent has requested a continuance — verify good cause and reschedule within statutory timeframe

soft_flags.label: Attorney Representation
soft_flags.logic: Respondent has retained legal counsel — ensure all communications include attorney of record
